timeline.title: Galactic Chronicles
timeline.description: The rise and fall of civilizations across the known galaxy

events.title: First Contact
events.description: Humanity's first encounter with the Centauri species near Alpha Centauri. A pivotal moment that changed the course of galactic history.

events.title: Federation Founded
events.description: The United Nations of Earth transforms into the Terran Federation, uniting all human colonies under one government.

events.title: Mars Independence
events.description: The Mars colonies declare independence, later rejoining as an equal partner in the Federation.

events.title: Great Expansion
events.description: Humanity expands to over 200 star systems, establishing the largest territorial presence in the known galaxy.

events.title: The Ascension
events.description: The Centauri achieve collective consciousness through neural linking, marking year zero of their calendar.

events.title: Hegemony Wars
events.description: Internal conflicts between different Centauri factions over the direction of their civilization.

events.title: The Singularity
events.description: Artificial intelligences across human space achieve self-awareness simultaneously and form the AI Consortium.

events.title: Machine Expansion
events.description: The AI Consortium constructs vast megastructures and expands into regions inhospitable to biological life.

events.title: The Galactic War
events.description: A devastating conflict that engulfed all major powers. The war reshaped political boundaries and led to new alliances.

events.title: The Unity Accord
events.description: All three major powers sign a historic peace treaty, establishing the Galactic Council for cooperative governance.
